class.name: FestivalNotebook
class.brief_description: The only state that survives a run: everything Alex has learned.
class.description: The notebook records which knowledge ids Alex has ever learned and can be saved to and loaded from disk between runs. Progression is entirely knowledge-based, so the notebook is what makes the replay loop meaningful. Registered as the [code]FestivalNotebook[/code] singleton.

signal.name: knowledge_learned
signal.description: Emitted the first time a knowledge id is learned.

signal.name: notebook_loaded
signal.description: Emitted after the notebook is loaded from disk.
